name: Craftcloud
description: Craftcloud v5 API for 3D printing/CNC model configurations, price requests, grouped vendor offers, carts, orders, and order status.

credential_fields.name: token
credential_fields.label: Optional API Token
credential_fields.description: Craftcloud public Swagger does not declare auth. Leave blank unless Craftcloud gives you a partner token for a private deployment.

tools.name: health_check
tools.description: Check Craftcloud API health.

tools.name: upload_model
tools.description: Upload a model file to Craftcloud. The initial response may not include parsed geometry yet; poll get_model until parsing completes.

file.description: Model file bytes as base64, data URL, or raw string.

tools.name: get_model
tools.description: Get a Craftcloud model by id. A 206 response means geometry parsing is still in progress and the request should be retried.

modelId.description: Craftcloud model id, usually the SHA-256 hash of the model file.

tools.name: evolve_model
tools.description: Create a new model variant from an existing model with different properties.

tools.name: create_configuration
tools.description: Create a product configuration from one or more existing model ids and quantities.

body.description: Configuration body: { items: [{ modelId, quantity, scale? }] }.

tools.name: get_configuration
tools.description: Get a Craftcloud configuration by id.

tools.name: create_price_request
tools.description: Request Craftcloud quotes for one or more model ids, country, currency, and optional material/vendor filters.

body.description: Price body: { currency, countryCode, models: [{ modelId, quantity, scale? }], materialConfigIds?, vendorIds?, cartId?, refresh?, topMaterialConfigsOnly? }.

tools.name: get_price
tools.description: Retrieve prices for a Craftcloud price request id.

tools.name: get_grouped_prices
tools.description: Retrieve prices for a Craftcloud price request grouped by vendor.

tools.name: create_multi_model_offer
tools.description: Create a multi-model offer using the same body shape as a price request.

tools.name: get_multi_model_offer
tools.description: Get a multi-model offer by price id.

tools.name: get_multi_model_offer_stats
tools.description: Get quote statistics for each model configuration in a multi-model offer.

tools.name: lookup_multi_model_quote
tools.description: Lookup a multi-model quote.

tools.name: create_offer
tools.description: Create an offer.

tools.name: get_offer_cart
tools.description: Return a cart object for an offer id.

tools.name: get_offer_configuration
tools.description: Return the model configuration for an offer id.

tools.name: create_cart
tools.description: Create a cart from shipping ids, currency, quote ids, and optional notes/reference/voucher.

body.description: Cart body: { shippingIds, currency, quotes: [{ id, types?, note? }], note?, customerReference?, voucherCode? }.

tools.name: create_order
tools.description: Create an order from a cart id and user shipping/billing data.

body.description: Order body: { cartId, user: { emailAddress, shipping, billing }, gaClientId?, customsInformation?, appId? }.

tools.name: get_order
tools.description: Get a Craftcloud order by id.

tools.name: get_order_status
tools.description: Get Craftcloud order status.

tools.name: get_order_configuration
tools.description: Return the quote configuration for an order id.

tools.name: validate_address
tools.description: Validate a shipping or billing address.

tools.name: validate_vat
tools.description: Validate VAT information.
